x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert noise ratio measures how many alerts are meaningful vs automatically closed. High noise degrades Now Assist event correlation training signal.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure CLEAR event processing to auto-close alerts when triggering conditions resolve. Enable idle timeout auto-close for transient alerts. High manual closure rates indicate noisy alerts that degrade Now Assist ITOM event correlation training signal.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert noise ratio measures how many alerts are meaningful vs automatically closed. High noise degrades Now Assist event correlation training signal.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Alert Auto-Close Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-30);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No alerts in last 30 days',
            finding: 'No alerts found in the last 30 days. Auto-close rate cannot be assessed — Event Management may not be in use.'
        };
    }

    var gaClosed = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaClosed.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaClosed.addQuery('state', 'Closed');
    gaClosed.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaClosed.query();
    var closed = gaClosed.next() ? parseInt(gaClosed.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((closed / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + ' alerts in last 30 days | ' + closed + ' closed (' + pct + '%)';

    if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of recent alerts are closed. Healthy auto-close rate indicates clean CLEAR event processing — Now Assist ITOM event correlation training signal is not polluted by stale alerts.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of recent alerts are closed (target: 50%+). Low auto-close rate indicates noisy alerts that degrade Now Assist ITOM event correlation training signal.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of recent alerts are closed. Very low auto-close rate means Now Assist ITOM is learning from a noisy, unresolved alert corpus — AI correlation accuracy will be significantly degraded.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005986</number>
<order>70</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure CLEAR event processing to auto-close alerts when triggering conditions resolve. Enable idle timeout auto-close for transient alerts. High manual closure rates indicate noisy alerts that degrade Now Assist ITOM event correlation training signal.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
